title: Pergeseran yang Tak Terlihat
theme: Menjelajahi perasaan aneh saat objek-objek familiar di rumah bergeser secara misterius, memicu pertanyaan tentang ingatan dan realitas pribadi.

cover.prompt: An interior view of a quiet apartment studio in the gentle illumination of morning. A wooden bookshelf is prominently featured, holding many neatly organized novels. One particular novel, distinctively placed upside down on a shelf, its cover unseen, creates a subtle visual anomaly within the otherwise tidy arrangement. The composition uses the rule of thirds, focusing on the bookshelf.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: A graphic designer, Riana, notices familiar objects in her meticulously tidy apartment mysteriously shifting. Initially dismissing it, the incidents intensify, leading to paranoia and self-doubt. Installing hidden cameras, she discovers herself sleepwalking, moving items, and leaving subconscious notes. Riana realizes these acts are a manifestation of stress and monotonous routine, prompting her to seek professional help for self-discovery and a deeper understanding of her inner self.
